violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the fan above the dishwasher and air vents above cookline have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The floor tile grout in the dish room and by service side of kitchen was observed to be low and had standing water and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to regrout areas to prevent the accumulation of standing water and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris in the knife block. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection as well as the knife block. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Chicken soup, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, food items were prepared the following evening. Food items were observed tightly covered with plastic wrap and 2 pans were stacked on-top of each other and observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan above the dishwasher and air vents above cookline have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

A hose is connected directly to the water supply at the 3-bay sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2026

The floor tile grout in the dish room and by service side of kitchen was observed to be low and had standing water and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to regrout areas to prevent the accumulation of standing water and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Several ceiling tiles were observed sagging in the kitchen area and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment to replace ceiling tiles that are in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The deli slicer was taken apart and thoroughly cleaned during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan above the dishwasher has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces are to cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The floor tile grout in the dish room and by service side of kitchen was observed to be low and had standing water and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to regrout areas to prevent the accumulation of standing water and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Several ceiling tiles were observed sagging in the kitchen area and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment to replace ceiling tiles that are in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
